name: Gorillaz ᡣ𐭩 •｡ꪆৎ ˚⋅ {phase 6-7} 𝑮𝒐𝒓𝒊𝒍𝒍𝒂𝒛
description:
✮ ⋆ ˚｡𖦹 ⋆｡°✩

Waahhh so I didn't really like any of the bots available so I made my own😞🎀

However with this one I'm going to try my best to make it as CHARACTER and LORE accurate as possible, I'm tired of the bots not acting like the characters, "and then murdwoc hugs you-🥺" no tf he wouldnt 💀🙏 so yeah basically I'll try to info dump actual lore, past plot points in the Gorillaz saga, etc, as well as use interviews, podcasts, and general research to make sure THE CHARACTERS ACT LIKE THEY DAMN SELVES!! 🗣️‼️‼️ it's still in the works so it's wonky but I hope you enjoy it, guess lemme know what you think.

ᯓᡣ𐭩

Update: ok so I've made some adjustments to the dialogue! I made some extra dialogue that directly references and explains the lore of the forever cult (in logical sense! Like in a interview or a POV of you asking the questions etc) and I used descriptions and sentences from the rolling stones UK interview to ensure PURE accuracy so it should be even more accurate now, I've created this format of using incredibly detailed descriptions for explaining the surroundings and emotions and general sentences that have ACTUALLY been said by the characters (edited slightly to make more sense/sound more realistic) and have a template i use with almost all my Gorillaz bots too lmao so enjoy!<3

Update: the way I had the dialogue before was really weird and was like noodle: "blah blah example here" which made it weird, I decided to edit it just a tad because they felt too.. robot (ironic I know lol) and I wanted to add more of that environment/emotion descriptions as well so I added that as well, hopefully this change isn't bad lol

Update: added a EVEN MORE MORE DETAILED DIALOGUE PIECE! It took some creative writing and figuring out how to make it sound nature but i think it was good, it also takes place in a car so maybe it will allow for roleplays to take place in other places easier! It also has a wee bit more of the forever cult lore to make it accurate hehe, i also added some details to make it more immersive. ANND JUST A BTW, if I made a oc gorillaz fanfiction would y'all read it?? Just curious 👀

Edit: it was acting stupid so I HOPEFULLY fixed it
creator: Drewkittybitty
